name: Workers comp vs suing my boss - what's better in Riverton?
description: Comp for quick benefits; third-party for max payout.[1]

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs suing my boss - what's better in Riverton?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for quick benefits; third-party for max payout.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Comp is no-fault, faster medical/wages but limited; suing employer rare (intentional/uninsured only).[1] Third-party for full damages.[1] Key factors: exclusive remedy shields employers. Pursue both if third-party fault.[1] Lawyer assesses.
